# Yog Arogyadham

Yog Arogyadham is an Iyengar medical yoga centre serving Dehradun and Haridwar, Uttarakhand, India.

## Services
- BKS Iyengar medical yoga therapy
- Therapeutic yoga for back pain, sciatica, spondylitis, knee pain, posture and mobility issues
- Guided breathwork and personalised practice plans
- Free consultation for new patients

## Condition Guides
- Back pain: https://yogaarogyadham.studio/conditions/back-pain.html
- Sciatica: https://yogaarogyadham.studio/conditions/sciatica.html
- Cervical spondylosis: https://yogaarogyadham.studio/conditions/cervical-spondylosis.html
- Knee pain: https://yogaarogyadham.studio/conditions/knee-pain.html
- Diabetes support: https://yogaarogyadham.studio/conditions/diabetes-support.html
- Slip disc: https://yogaarogyadham.studio/conditions/slip-disc.html
- Frozen shoulder: https://yogaarogyadham.studio/conditions/frozen-shoulder.html
- Arthritis: https://yogaarogyadham.studio/conditions/arthritis.html
- Lumbar pain: https://yogaarogyadham.studio/conditions/lumbar-pain.html
- Stress and anxiety support: https://yogaarogyadham.studio/conditions/stress-anxiety-support.html

## Locations
- Dehradun centre: Trimurti Bhavan, OPP. Rock Valley Apartment, Alka Dairy, GMS Road, Sevla Kala Chowk, Dehradun, India
- Haridwar centre: Aaroham Yoga Studio, 725/1, Avash Vikas Model Colony, Opp. Prem Nagar Ashram, Haridwar, Uttarakhand, India
- Dehradun location page: https://yogaarogyadham.studio/dehradun-medical-yoga-therapy.html
- Haridwar location page: https://yogaarogyadham.studio/haridwar-medical-yoga-therapy.html

## Contact
- Website: https://yogaarogyadham.studio/
- Phone: +91 79830 40473
- Haridwar phone: +91 72175 36616
- Email: ajitsinghchauhanss@gmail.com

## Key Facts
- Founded in 2010
- Offers Iyengar-based therapeutic yoga support
- Serves patients across Dehradun, Haridwar and Uttarakhand

## Important Note
Yog Arogyadham provides yoga-based wellness and therapeutic support. Medical decisions, diagnosis and treatment should always be confirmed with a qualified healthcare professional.
